name: form-filling-agents
description: AI-powered form filling agents — Browser Extension + Web Portal

scripts.benchmark:rule-based:quick: cd extension && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json scripts/run-benchmark.ts --quick --agent rule-based
scripts.benchmark:rule-based:full: cd extension && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json scripts/run-benchmark.ts --full  --agent rule-based
scripts.benchmark:mcp-agent:quick: cd extension && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json scripts/run-benchmark.ts --quick --agent mcp-agent
scripts.benchmark:mcp-agent:full: cd extension && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json scripts/run-benchmark.ts --full  --agent mcp-agent
scripts.benchmark:embedding: cd extension && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json scripts/run-benchmark.ts --quick --agent embedding-matcher
